title: Second-act Route v2 phase
summary: After the front-half chapter and filing wave closed cleanly, lane 4 should strengthen the inland branch as a distinct second act. This wave clarifies the treeline-to-tundra route chapter, then adds one compact second-act filing or support payoff using existing seams.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the second-act Route v2 chapter handoff.
execution_order.why_now: The early beach-to-forest chapter is now clearer than the inland branch.

execution_order.goal: Implement second-act Route v2 chapter framing.
execution_order.why_now: Treeline and tundra should feel like a true second act, not a checklist extension.

execution_order.goal: Review second-act Route v2 chapter framing.
execution_order.why_now: The inland branch needs stronger place memory without becoming heavier or chattier.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the second-act filing or support handoff.
execution_order.why_now: Once the route chapter reads more clearly, the return payoff should deepen completion feeling.

execution_order.goal: Implement second-act filing or support payoff.
execution_order.why_now: A small notebook or support-row payoff can make the second act feel more authored without widening the shell.

execution_order.goal: Review second-act filing or support payoff.
execution_order.why_now: The new payoff should deepen the outing loop without adding clutter.

guardrails: Reuse current Route v2, note-tabs, support row, and guided-season seams.
Do not add a new station page, quest log, or heavier support bar.
Prefer clearer chapter framing and return payoff over extra mechanics.
Keep the tone notebook-first and place-led.

main_217_focus.target_state: first edge-pattern-line routes state immediately after tundra-survey-slice logs
main_217_focus.copy_goal: give the inland chapter one compact logged close before Scrub Pattern takes over the strip

recommended_wrap.label: INLAND LINE LOGGED
recommended_wrap.text: Tundra Survey closes the inland line. Scrub Pattern waits in Coastal Scrub.

guardrails: Leave the route board itself pointed at Scrub Pattern.
Do not rename the canonical filed Short Season note path.
Do not widen into nursery wording or a broader guided-season rewrite in this pass.

handoff_prompt: Read AGENTS.md, .agents/lane-runner.md, .agents/project-memory.md, .agents/work-queue.md, .agents/lanes/lane-4.md, docs/reports/2026-04-03-lane-4-second-act-route-v2-phase.md, docs/reports/2026-04-03-second-act-route-v2-chapter-review.md, docs/reports/2026-04-03-second-act-note-tabs-close-handoff.md, and this packet. Treat the next wave as a compact payoff pass, not another chapter-spread rewrite: add one note-tabs-only inland logged close on the first edge-pattern-line state after tundra-survey-slice so the inland chapter gets a notebook-style page turn before Scrub Pattern takes over, while leaving nursery wording, route-marker behavior, and the stable filed Short Season identity alone.
